title: Wrong query result with old analyzer and filter by `currentDatabase()`
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
Wrong query result
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
idk
### How to reproduce
``` sql
CREATE DATABASE b4891babd5aa2cade4970f4dee43944d;
USE b4891babd5aa2cade4970f4dee43944d;
-- Works otherwise
SET prefer_localhost_replica=0;
-- Works otherwise
SET enable_analyzer=0;
-- Parallel replicas are not welcome here
SET enable_parallel_replicas=0;
SELECT count(), min(number), max(number), avg(number) FROM numbers_mt(1e6) FORMAT NULL SETTINGS log_comment='03777_distributed_with_filter_by_current_db_bug';
SYSTEM FLUSH LOGS text_log, query_log;
SELECT
count() > 0,
count() = countIf(log_comment = '03777_distributed_with_filter_by_current_db_bug')
FROM remote('127.0.0.{1,2}', system, query_log)
WHERE (current_database = currentDatabase()) AND (log_comment = '03777_distributed_with_filter_by_current_db_bug') AND (event_date >= yesterday());
SELECT
count() > 0,
count() = countIf(log_comment = '03777_distributed_with_filter_by_current_db_bug')
FROM remote('127.0.0.{1,2}', system, query_log)
WHERE (current_database = 'b4891babd5aa2cade4970f4dee43944d') AND (log_comment = '03777_distributed_with_filter_by_current_db_bug') AND (event_date >= yesterday());
DROP DATABASE b4891babd5aa2cade4970f4dee43944d SYNC;
```
### Expected behavior
_No response_

key_bug_features: Filter by currentDatabase() in query log
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_db.test_table (id UInt32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now(), value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_db.test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5), (2, 'test2', NULL), (3, 'test3', 20.0);
SELECT count(), min(value), max(value), avg(value) FROM test_db.test_table WHERE name LIKE 'test%';
SELECT count() > 0 FROM remote('127.0.0.{1,2}', test_db, test_table) WHERE (current_database = currentDatabase()) AND (created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY);
